claim: Qwen 3.5 (397B, 17B active) achieves 19x speed boost over Qwen 3 Max with multimodal training from scratch
actionable: Consider Qwen 3.5 for latency-sensitive inference where 19x speedup offsets slightly lower reasoning than full-Qwen3-Max models

claim: Multi-token prediction during pre-training accelerates model learning compared to single-token prediction
actionable: When fine-tuning or training, use multi-token prediction objectives to accelerate convergence

claim: Expanding tokenizer vocab to 250K tokens significantly improves multilingual coverage (from 119 to 200+ languages)
actionable: For multilingual models, use larger tokenizers (250K+) to avoid inefficient token proliferation in non-English languages

claim: RL training environments scale helps reasoning, but hundreds of thousands of environments may involve significant duplication
actionable: When evaluating claims of massive RL environment counts, question whether they represent unique or variant distributions
